executives.name: John Ciampaglia
executives.background: Chief Executive Officer of Sprott Asset Management LP since 2017. Previously, Senior Managing Director of Sprott Inc. and Chief Operating Officer of Sprott Asset Management LP.

executives.name: Varinder Bhathal
executives.background: Chief Financial Officer of Sprott Asset Management LP since 2017. Managing Director, Corporate Finance and Investment Operations of Sprott Inc. since 2017.

executives.name: Thomas Ulrich
executives.background: Managing Director, General Counsel and Chief Compliance Officer of Sprott Asset Management LP since 2012.

board_of_directors.name: John Ciampaglia
board_of_directors.background: President of the Trust and CEO of Sprott Asset Management LP.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Clark
board_of_directors.background: President of KBW Asset Management from 2010 to 2013. Previously, served as a Managing Director at Credit Suisse.

board_of_directors.name: Barbara Zvan
board_of_directors.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of University Pension Plan Ontario since 2020. Previously, Chief Risk and Strategy Officer of Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan.
